summary: Fix compilation errors by correcting the missing import for `createAndroidComposeRule`. When `createAndroidComposeRule` was unresolved, the test runner could not infer `setContent` as a `@Composable` scope, resulting in cascaded compilation errors.

files.code_diff:
<<<<<<< SEARCH

import androidx.compose.ui.test.onNodeWithText
=======
import androidx.compose.ui.test.junit4.createAndroidComposeRule
import androidx.compose.ui.test.onNodeWithText
>>>>>>> REPLACE
